Contact

You can email me direct: kit.malthouse.mp@parliament.uk

OR

You can write to me or call me:

Kit Malthouse MP
House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA

Telephone 0207 219 5605

I hold regular surgeries in Andover, Overton, Whitchurch, Tadley and Kingsclere and if you would like an appointment please do call or email.
